prompt: Create an ultra-detailed cinematic fantasy scene inside a messy teenage bedroom with warm orange-blue ambient lighting. In the center, show Kylian Mbappé magically stepping out of a gigantic illustrated comic book leaning open against the back wall. The oversized comic book cover and pages should feature dynamic football comic art, speed lines, lightning streaks, torn-paper edges, and the large visible title text MBAPPÉ: L'HISTOIRE. The player wears a France national team navy blue kit with a vertical red-and-white center stripe, red socks, white wrist tape, and grey boots, posed mid-stride with a football near his feet, as if breaking through the page into the room. Surround him with flying torn paper strips and glowing blue-white motion trails for a dramatic superhero entrance. The bedroom should be cluttered and realistic: exactly 12 notable room elements are visible — 1 black-and-red gaming chair on the left, 1 bed edge on the right, 1 blue carpet, 1 warm LED rope light looping across the floor and up near the bed, 1 game controller on the floor, 1 cardboard box or device near the lower right, 1 pair of blue football boots at lower left, 1 scattered red garment, 1 pile of light-colored clothes in the foreground, 1 dark football shirt in the lower right foreground, 1 graffiti-covered left wall, and multiple football and comic posters on the walls including a small Mbappé poster on the right. Make the room feel lived-in, with scattered clothes, gaming accessories, posters, soft bed linens, and dramatic shadows. Use a vertical 9:16 composition, low-angle cinematic perspective, volumetric lighting, glossy comic-book textures, realistic fabric detail, crisp focus on the player, and high-energy motion blur in the effects. No watermarks, no UI, no extra readable branding beyond the comic title and poster-style text.
